name: venuesync-app
description: Fanzo is a high-fidelity, interactive web prototype designed to revolutionize the physical event experience for attendees at large-scale sporting venues. Built with React and Vite, the platform focuses on solving common stadium pain points like crowd movement, waiting times, and real-time coordination through an immersive, "glassmorphic" user interface.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
